## Bug 1: Persona avatars not showing in congress UI

**Root cause: `personas.db` is out of sync with the YAML frontmatter for several personas, and some personas simply have no `avatar_url` set anywhere.**

The `/api/agents` endpoint (`agent.ts`) reads from `personas.db` first — specifically `SELECT * FROM personas`. Several personas in the DB have `avatar_url = NULL` (adelbert, hume), and some that were recently acti...(truncated)
